description:
Not every “behavior problem” is actually a training problem ￼

A new study has found that people mostly recognized pain in dogs ONLY when it was obvious…

What’s a subtle sign that tells you something might be wrong with a dog?


Get instant access to my free 30 day training guide HERE: https://pupford.com/training


SOURCE: The abilities in dog pain sign recognition as assessed by presenting seventeen listed dog behavioural signs and three case descriptions to dog owners and non-dog owners
Gard

title: What If You’re Solving the Wrong Problem with Your Dog?
